---
title: "Introduction to Habitat Condition Assessment System (HCAS)"
author: "Roozbeh Valavi, ..."
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    fig_caption: yes
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to Habitat Condition Assessment System (HCAS)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


## Introduction


## HCAS steps


## Getting example data



## Histogram calculation


## Histogram normalisation


## Benchmarking


## Calibration
